record.field: Update for ticket {ticket_number}: {ticket_name}. Current stage: {stage_name}. Team: {team_name}. SLA status: {sla_label}. Track progress here: {public_portal_url}
Ticket {ticket_number} has been resolved and closed by {changed_by_name}. If you still need help, reopen or review the case here: {public_portal_url}
Escalation alert for {ticket_number}: {ticket_name}. Rule: {rule_name}. Reason: {event_reason}. Customer: {partner_name}. Open the ticket in Odoo to take action.
